commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh So shall he startle many nations; the kings shall shut their mouths at him: for that which had not been told them shall they see; and that which they had not heard shall they consider. Sprinkle with baptism, (Haydock) and his manifold graces. (Calmet) Septuagint, "so many nations shall wonder at him. "(Haydock) Mouth, out of reverence. How many great princes have submitted to his yoke. (Calmet) Beheld. The Gentiles (Menochius) embrace the faith, at the sight of Christ's miracles.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
